name: lafayettefamilyymca.org
message: [AI generated] The Lafayette Family YMCA is a non-profit community organization based in Lafayette, Indiana. They offer a wide range of programs such as youth development, healthy living, and social responsibility initiatives. Programs include child care, fitness training, swimming lessons, summer camps, and more. The Lafayette YMCA strives to nurture the potential of every kid, promote healthy living, and foster a sense of social responsibility.
